name: flowai-workflow
description: Scaffold and supervise flowai-workflow — DAG-based engine for orchestrating AI agents. Wraps `flowai-workflow init` for setup and supervises live runs with diagnose-and-resume on failure.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold and supervise flowai-workflow — DAG-based engine for orchestrating AI agents. Wraps `flowai-workflow init` for setup and supervises live runs with diagnose-and-resume on failure.
